disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Rapid palpitations and near-fainting came on during physical exertion (jogging) and settled with rest
trigger_question_examples: What were you doing when it started?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It hit me while I was running — my heart raced and my vision went dark, and it only eased off once I stopped and sat down for about 15 minutes.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A close blood relative died suddenly and unexpectedly at a young age
trigger_question_examples: Has anyone in your family died suddenly or unexpectedly, especially young?
Any family history of heart problems?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — my uncle on my mum's side died suddenly when he was only around 30. We never found out exactly why.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The exertional palpitations have been worsening in frequency/severity over the last two months
trigger_question_examples: Has this been happening more often lately?
Is it getting worse over time?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Over the last couple of months it's been happening more when I push myself in training — today was the worst by far.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The dizziness had an abrupt arrhythmic prodrome (palpitations first) rather than a classic vasovagal build-up
trigger_question_examples: Did your heart race before you felt faint, or did you feel faint first?
Was there any warning like nausea, sweating or going hot before it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The racing came first and then my vision went dark — it wasn't the usual feeling-sick-and-hot before a faint, it was my heart going wild.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Feels a skipped or extra beat when checking the pulse at rest
trigger_question_examples: When you feel your pulse now, is it steady or does it skip?
Do you notice extra or missed beats at rest?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: When I feel my pulse it sometimes seems to skip or add an extra thump, even sitting still.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No chest pain, no fevers, no recent illness; denies recreational or performance-enhancing drug use and stimulant abuse
trigger_question_examples: Any chest pain, fever or recent illness?
Any energy drinks, supplements, stimulants or other substances?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No chest pain and I haven't been sick. I don't take any drugs or performance stuff — maybe the odd coffee.
